basics.name: Matthew Gill
basics.label: Lead Site Reliability Engineer
basics.summary: Senior infrastructure and reliability engineering leader with extensive experience in site reliability engineering, converged infrastructure, systems administration, automation, security, and higher education technology leadership. Proven background in cloud, DevOps, virtualization, scripting, and large-scale infrastructure modernization.

work.name: Blue Cross & Blue Shield of Louisiana
work.summary: Lead reliability and infrastructure engineering initiatives focused on automation, platform resilience, cloud operations, and continual improvement.
highlights: Lead site reliability engineering strategy and operations
Improve platform stability, deployment reliability, and operational efficiency
